/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -m64 CMakeFiles/histogram_test.dir/histogram/test.c.o CMakeFiles/histogram_test.dir/histogram/test1d.c.o CMakeFiles/histogram_test.dir/histogram/test2d.c.o CMakeFiles/histogram_test.dir/histogram/test1d_resample.c.o CMakeFiles/histogram_test.dir/histogram/test2d_resample.c.o CMakeFiles/histogram_test.dir/histogram/test1d_trap.c.o CMakeFiles/histogram_test.dir/histogram/test2d_trap.c.o -o bin/histogram_test  libgsl.a libgslcblas.a -lm
